articles.title: Mass. police dispatcher injured in Iran conflict
articles.description:
The Sudbury police dispatcher reportedly suffered minor injuries while serving overseas with the U.S. Navy.

The post Mass. police dispatcher injured in Iran conflict appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sudbury police dispatcher injured while serving with U.S. Navy in Iran conflict.
Dispatcher sustained minor injuries during deployment; specific details on injuries not disclosed.
Local community in Sudbury expresses support for the dispatcher and their family.

articles.title: What Baylor Scheierman said about his fractured thumb
articles.description:
"We're kind of just evaluating it as it goes," Scheierman said. "But felt good enough to be out there so it's just how it's going to be."

The post What Baylor Scheierman said about his fractured thumb appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Baylor Scheierman is evaluating his fractured thumb injury day by day.
Scheierman felt good enough to participate in practice despite the injury.
His recovery status may affect the Boston Celtics' lineup decisions moving forward.

articles.title: ‘It feels like home’: Chinatown celebrates the Year of the Horse
articles.description:
Snow or shine, Chinatown’s annual Lunar New Year parade returned Sunday as about 10 lion dance troupes wove through the neighborhood.

The post ‘It feels like home’: Chinatown celebrates the Year of the Horse  appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Chinatown's Lunar New Year parade celebrated the Year of the Horse on Sunday.
Approximately 10 lion dance troupes participated in the festivities.
The event fosters community spirit and cultural pride among Boston residents.

articles.title: Boston 25 News promotes Shiri Spear to chief meteorologist
articles.description:
"Her deep knowledge of the weather, commitment to keeping our community safe, and her genuine care for the community make her the perfect choice for Chief Meteorologist."

The post Boston 25 News promotes Shiri Spear to chief meteorologist appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston 25 News promotes Shiri Spear to chief meteorologist effective immediately.
Spear's extensive weather knowledge aims to enhance community safety for Boston residents.
Her promotion reflects a commitment to local weather reporting and community engagement.

articles.title: R.I. prosecutor who told police ‘I’m an AG’ during arrest is back at work
articles.description:
Devon Flanagan had been on unpaid leave since August, when she pleaded no contest to a misdemeanor trespassing charge.

The post R.I. prosecutor who told police ‘I’m an AG’ during arrest is back at work appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Devon Flanagan returns to work after unpaid leave since August 2023.
She pleaded no contest to a misdemeanor trespassing charge.
Her return may affect public trust in Rhode Island's legal system.
